disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete loss of voice developing over about six hours this afternoon, reducing to a painful whisper
trigger_question_examples: What is going on with your voice?
When did the voice loss start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My voice went croaky this morning and by this afternoon it was completely gone — I can only whisper, and even that hurts.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Preceding three days of coryzal symptoms — runny nose and fatigue — before the throat and voice symptoms began
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell in the days before this?
Any cold or flu symptoms recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I have had a runny nose and felt run down for about three days, and then the throat and voice thing started.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dry, non-productive tickling cough severe enough to cause gagging and retching
trigger_question_examples: Is the cough bringing anything up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It is a dry, tickly cough — nothing comes up — but the fits are so violent I sometimes gag or nearly retch.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild pain on swallowing attributed to frequent forceful throat clearing rather than severe odynophagia
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the throat pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It is a bit sore when I swallow, but I think that is just from clearing my throat so much — it is not agony.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathing is comfortable and quiet with no noisy or high-pitched breathing; no drooling; able to swallow saliva and drink; no high fever
trigger_question_examples: Is your breathing noisy or hard at all?
Are you able to swallow your saliva, and have you had a high fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing is fine and quiet, I am not drooling, I can swallow my spit and sip water okay, and I have not had a raging fever — maybe felt a bit warm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications and OTC throat lozenges tried without relief; no need to use the voice for work for the next 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medications?
Have you tried anything for it so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No regular meds. I have just been sucking throat lozenges but they do nothing. And I do not have to talk for work for a couple of days.
